title: ProductCon New York: The AI Conference for Product Leaders
summary: Eric speaks at ProductCon New York at the Metropolitan Pavilion, joining product leaders from Slack, Business Insider, and Miro at the flagship AI and product leadership conference. Billed as 'Author, The Lean Startup & Incorruptible,' Ries brings the book's governance framework to an audience of thousands of product managers and tech leaders grappling with how to build AI-era products responsibly.
blockquote: Bringing together global leaders in AI and product for actionable takeaways, real-world use cases, and demos.
